no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The requested helper and regression test are already present in the current tree (`cli/internal/evidence/untrusted.go` and `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_evidence_test.go`), so no code change was needed for the delimiter contract itself. However, the required verification command `cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... ./internal/agent/...` does not pass in this baseline: `internal/agent` fails in pre-existing cancellation/probe tests (`TestWorker_HonorsCancelMidAttempt`, `TestCancelLatency_UnderSLA`) and `internal/agent/workerprobe` fails on VCS stamping (`go build ddx: error obtaining VCS status`). Those failures block a clean completion signal for the bead without stepping outside the bead scope.
